title: Family Memories Video Music Edit -- 2
desc:
I’ve gathered a handful of treasured family clips and now need a polished version that feels warm and cohesive. The footage is already in the right order; what’s missing is the perfect background track and balanced audio levels.  

Your task is to choose (or create) royalty-free music that matches the mood, mix it so dialogue and ambient sounds remain clear, then export a clean 1080p MP4 ready to share with relatives. Light cross-fades or volume automation are welcome if they help the flow, but no flashy effects—simple and heartfelt is the aim.

Deliverables  
• Final video with mixed background music  
• Separate project file (Premiere Pro, Final Cut, or DaVinci Resolve)  

Acceptance criteria  
– Music is properly licensed or royalty-free  
– Voices stay intelligible with no clipping  
– Sync and pacing remain intact across the full runtime  

If you’ve done similar family reels, feel free to share one so I can hear how you treat audio.
